lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Yes, er, welcome to the zoo! I'm afraid I'm kind of busy right now; what was it you wanted?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, you sound like someone who needs a quest doing!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Well... maybe. How much do you know about hunting?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I know a little bit...

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: No, I could do with some help, but I'm afraid I need somebody with a little more experience.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Actually, now that you come to mention it, you might be able to help me.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: A few weeks ago we had a delivery of a northern ferret. They're funny little creatures. Turns out they're tricksy little blighters too.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Whilst we were unloading him from the cart he managed to escape his cage. What's more he gave the driver a nasty nip on the way out too.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: This was obviously a bit of a blow, you can't make a new attraction without any animals.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: We got in contact with one of our associates, a huntsman called Nickolaus, who agreed to capture us another.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Funny thing is we haven't heard from him for some time now. I don't suppose you'd mind having a look for him?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. Any idea where I should start looking?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Well the northern ferret is mostly found around the mountains just west of the Gnome Stronghold, so that would probably be as good a place as any to start looking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have the time.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Oh well, I'm sure he'll be okay out there on his own.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Ah, hello again. Have you had any luck finding out about Nickolaus' whereabouts yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, nothing yet I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Like I said, he's most likely to be camping out somewhere to the west of the Gnome Stronghold.

sections.title: Using the Metal feather on the Rocky outcrop
Using the Metal feather on the Cave entrance
Entering any tunnel in the cave

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Hello? Er... excuse me?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Hello? Er... excuse me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, are you Nickolaus?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Aha, I see my reputation precedes me. Yes, I am the renowned hunter and explorer Nickolaus. You've arrived just in time to witness a very momentous occasion, for I have just discovered the nest of a giant

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: eagle. And a most amazing discovery it is too, even if I do say so myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Ardougne zookeeper sent me to find you.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Ah yes, he sent me to find a ferret. A trivial task, and one which pales in comparison compared to this momentous discovery. I'm sure he can wait.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So it's not that you're trapped then?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well I think trapped is quite a negative way of looking at it.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: I will admit however that getting out of here may be a little tricky. I did have a plan, but unfortunately it didn't involve being stuck in this nest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I help at all?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Actually I believe you could. I need to somehow trick the eagles into thinking I'm one of them. Could you fashion some sort of disguise for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would that involve?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well, you could go and speak to the fancy dress shop owner in Varrock. He can make anything if you give him the right materials. In fact you should probably get a couple of disguises, one for each of us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a good idea. There are plenty of feathers around here. I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well it'll give you a lot of time to study the eagles.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Very true, and certainly an opportunity I wouldn't want to miss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll let you get on with your work then.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: It's always a pleasure to discuss my discoveries.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've come to rescue you.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: How very kind of you. But Nickolaus Farrick never needs rescuing. I may apparently be trapped in a giant eagle's nest, but it is all a cunning ruse to put the beast at ease.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, so you're not really trapped?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well I think trapped is quite a negative way of looking at it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aren't giant eagles mythical?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Oh many people believe so, yes, but my relentless exploration has paid off once again, for I stand now in the nest of such a supposedly mythical creature.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you manage to find the nest?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Through unfaltering dedication, attention to detail, oh, and I suppose there's the minor point that I got carried here by an eagle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So in fact the eagle found you?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: So it might appear to an amateur yes, and, well, I may have been a little lucky, but it's still a remarkable discovery don't you think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Amazing, but what do you intend to do now you've discovered it?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well, there's all sorts to do. I need to observe its behaviour patterns and document its feeding habits. The discovery is only just the beginning you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think you're trapped.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well I think trapped is quite a negative way of looking at it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll let you get on with your work then.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: It's always a pleasure to discuss my discoveries.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll let you get on with your work then.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: It's always a pleasure to discuss my discoveries.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Nickolaus, how are you getting on with your discoveries?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Wonderfully, these giant eagles are simply magnificent creatures. I absolutely must see about getting one as a pet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A pet? Are you crazy?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Quite possibly, quite possibly, but I haven't found a creature I couldn't tame yet.

sections.title: Visiting Nickolaus after agreeing to help him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Nickolaus, how are you getting on with your discoveries?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Wonderfully thank you, although I am still having just a little trouble convincing them to let me leave.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: I don't suppose you've managed to get that disguise I asked for yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not yet.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well like I said, the Varrock fancy dress shop is a good bet if you have the materials, and there are plenty of feathers around here.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: And while you're working on that, I'll get back to studying these incredible winged wonders.

sections.title: Returning to Asyff without the materials

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Now you look like someone who goes to a lot of fancy dress parties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr...what are you saying exactly?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: I'm just saying that perhaps you would like to peruse my selection of garments.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Or, if that doesn't interest you, then maybe you have something else to offer? I'm always on the look out for interesting or unusual new materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was it you needed to make those eagle costumes again?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: I should be able to knock something up if you get me 10 of the right sort of feather. I'll also need some swamp tar and some yellow dye.

sections.title: Returning to Asyff with the materials

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Now you look like someone who goes to a lot of fancy dress parties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr...what are you saying exactly?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: I'm just saying that perhaps you would like to peruse my selection of garments.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Or, if that doesn't interest you, then maybe you have something else to offer? I'm always on the look out for interesting or unusual new materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got the feathers and materials you requested. Can you make those giant eagle costumes for me now?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Certainly. It'll also cost you 50 gold pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't have that much money with me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here are the materials. Eagle me up.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: There we go; two eagle costumes. You should be the envy of the entire party with those.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, that's too expensive.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Well, feel free to come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Now you look like someone who goes to a lot of fancy dress parties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr...what are you saying exactly?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: I'm just saying that perhaps you would like to peruse my selection of garments.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Or, if that doesn't interest you, then maybe you have something else to offer? I'm always on the look out for interesting or unusual new materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you make another eagle costume for me?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Certainly, if you can supply the materials. I'll need appropriate feathers, swamp tar and some yellow dye. It'll also cost you 25 gold pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Now you look like someone who goes to a lot of fancy dress parties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr...what are you saying exactly?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: I'm just saying that perhaps you would like to peruse my selection of garments.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Or, if that doesn't interest you, then maybe you have something else to offer? I'm always on the look out for interesting or unusual new materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, specifically I'm after a couple of bird costumes.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Ah, an inspired choice. What kind of bird were you thinking of?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A giant eagle.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Very interesting. Unfortunately I don't think I have any giant eagle costumes in stock at the moment.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Of course if I had the materials I could make them for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What materials would you need?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Well, the main problem is that I'm fresh out of giant eagle feathers. I've been meaning to get onto my supplier about that for some time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait a second, you have a supplier? But I thought nobody knew where to find the nests?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Well, there was some chap in desert clothing. He said his name was Ali. He assured me they were giant eagle feathers, although when I come to think about it they were suspiciously similar to chicken feathers.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Anyway, you're probably looking at about 10 giant eagle feathers, assuming you can find a nest.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: I'd also need some swamp tar to hold things together and some yellow dye for the beaks. Everything else I can supply myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

sections.title: Bringing over the outfit to Nickolaus
Talking to Nickolaus while not wearing the eagle outfit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Nickolaus, how are you getting on with your discoveries?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Wonderfully thank you, although I am still having just a little trouble convincing them to let me leave.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: I don't suppose you've managed to get that disguise I asked for yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have one right here.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well bring it over here then. It's not much use to me over there.

sections.title: Talking to Nickolaus while wearing the eagle outfit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Nickolaus, how are you getting on with your discoveries?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: What's this, a young hatchling? Oh no, I hope it doesn't think I'm its dinner!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, Nickolaus, it's me! I'm just in disguise!

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: You're sure...you're sure you're not going to eat me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No of course not. You sent me to get you an eagle outfit remember? So you could get out of this nest?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Wow, that really is a very convincing disguise. Have you got one for me too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have one right here.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well bring it over here then. It's not much use to me over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not yet.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well like I said, the Varrock fancy dress shop is a good bet if you have the materials, and there are plenty of feathers around here.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: And while you're working on that, I'll get back to studying these incredible winged wonders.

sections.title: Winding a winch before interacting with the pedestal
Attempting to take a second bronze feather

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, give me that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Give me that or... Er...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your mother was a hamster, and your father smelt of elderberries!

sections.title: Inspecting the tunnel after getting the silver feather
Reclaiming the silver feather if it has been lost
Putting feed in a feeder that a stone eagle is already at
Attempting to take a second golden feather
Using the metal feather on the door
Using an eagle feather on the door
When using any of the metal feathers on the door
When using the last remaining feather on the door
Using a feather on the door after it is unlocked
Attempting to travel on a giant eagle

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Nickolaus, how are you getting on with your discoveries?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: What's this, a young hatchling? Oh no, I hope it doesn't think I'm its dinner!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, Nickolaus, it's me! I'm just in disguise!

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: You're sure...you're sure you're not going to eat me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No of course not. You sent me to get you an eagle outfit remember? So you could get out of this nest?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Wow, that really is a very convincing disguise. Have you got one for me too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have one right here.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Excellent, now there is no way the eagle will be able to tell me from one of its own.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Now you run off, and I'll meet you back down at the camp site.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not yet.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Well like I said, the Varrock fancy dress shop is a good bet if you have the materials, and there are plenty of feathers around here.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: And while you're working on that, I'll get back to studying these incredible winged wonders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've given you the disguise you needed, can we go now?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Calm down. You must realise I can't leave just like that, this is far too amazing an opportunity. Just go down to the camp site and I'll meet you there.

sections.title: Talking to Nickolaus by the camp

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Nickolaus.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: : Ah, hello again. Can I help at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I was originally sent to find you because of a ferret. Can you get me one at all?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: I'll do better than that. I'll teach you how to capture one yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds good to me. What do I do.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Come with me and I'll show you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, so we've baited the trap with meat, now what?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: And now...we wait. Quietly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But what if I don't like waiting for things?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Did I mention we wait quietly?

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Shhh, here comes something.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Ha ha, there you go! One gift-wrapped ferret ready for delivery.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: See, it's all just a matter of patience.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've not got the time right now.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Ah you don't get out of it that easily. When you've got the time come back and see me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering how you got on with those eagles.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: Ah wonderfully. They're actually most cooperative creatures once they get used to you. With some rope I'm sure you could find some way to tame them... maybe even fly on them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. I was just dropping by, wanted to make sure you hadn't been abducted again.

lines.speaker: Nickolaus
lines.text: No such luck I'm afraid, but I'm sure I'll make another discovery soon enough. I always seem to.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Ah, hello again. Have you had any luck finding a clue as to Nickolaus' whereabouts yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I have actually. He'd been abducted by giant eagles, but I managed to rescue him. He's now gotten back to his hunting.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Giant eagles? What a strange notion. Well, regardless, if you've found him can you tell him to hurry up with that ferret.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Even better, I have a ferret right here for you.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: You do? Ah, yes, wonderful, I never doubted you for a second. That'll make an excellent addition to the zoo.
